## Analyzers (2)

*Enrich observables with intelligence*

### [Vulners IOC v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Vulners)
Get information from the RST Threat Feed, which integrated with Vulners, for a domain, url or an IP address.

- **Author:** Dmitry Uchakin, Vulners team
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `url`, `domain`, `ip`

### [Vulners CVE v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Vulners)
Get information about CVE from powerful Vulners database.

- **Author:** Dmitry Uchakin, Vulners team
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `cve`
